timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil has escaped prison and plans a trap for Austin at a swinger's club in London; Austin and Mrs. Kensington are dispatched to confront him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Agent receiving mission briefing
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns from Basil Exposition that Dr. Evil has escaped prison and is setting a trap at the Electric Psychedelic Pussycat Swinger's Club; decides to confront him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Confront Dr. Evil at the Electric Psychedelic Pussycat Swinger's Club
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: En route to the swinger's club with Mrs. Kensington
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dr. Evil's trap at the club
evidence_quotes: We'll be there.
Let's go, baby!

relation_updates: Receives mission from Basil Exposition
Adversary Dr. Evil has escaped
status_updates: Now on active mission to intercept Dr. Evil

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil escapes in a cryogenic egg chair with his cat, rising through the ceiling as Austin fires and the room rumbles from rocket exhaust.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Austin Powers confronts Dr. Evil in a club back room to prevent his escape.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil enters cryogenic freezing in an egg chair and escapes through the ceiling as Austin fires at him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dr. Evil has frozen himself and escaped in the egg chair, which rose through the ceiling with rocket exhaust.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dr. Evil is frozen and at large, with his escape implying a future return.
evidence_quotes: AUSTIN I've got you again, Dr. Evil!
DR. EVIL (unseen, through mist) Not this time. Come, Mr. Bigglesworth! (calling out) See you in the future, Mr. Powers!
Austin begins FIRING at the egg chair.
The ceiling opens up and the egg rises through the opening.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin Powers is extracted from ice via laser, melted in warm goo, reanimated, and prepared for cleansing in a high-tech facility.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Focal character revived from cryogenic suspension
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin Powers is extracted from ice by laser, melted in warm goo, and reanimated.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Reanimated and beginning the cleansing process.
evidence_quotes: Lasers begin to cut Austin out of the ice in one huge cube.
A ROBOTIC ARM lifts the cube out of the berth and places it into a high-tech melting vat of warm liquid GOO.
Austin comes to life out of the goo on a draining platform.

status_updates: From frozen to alive
Located in cryogenic facility
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Naked, covering private parts, hairy, with frosted glasses.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin Powers, unfrozen in 1997, teams up with Vanessa Kensington, daughter of his former partner, to stop Dr. Evil, while adjusting to the 1990s and dealing with social awkwardness.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Spy briefed on new mission and partnered with Vanessa
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin is informed by Basil Exposition that it is 1997, the Cold War has ended, and he is assigned to stop Dr. Evil with Vanessa Kensington.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Stop Dr. Evil with Vanessa's help
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Assigned to begin the mission immediately with Vanessa
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Adjusting to the 1990s
evidence_quotes: It's 1997. You've been cryogenically frozen for thirty years.
The cold war's over.
You'll be working with Ms. Kensington.
my job is to acclimate you to the Nineties.

relation_updates: Assigned to work with Vanessa Kensington
status_updates: Aware of current year and mission
Underwent medical procedures

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin uses faulty x-ray glasses, hits on eighteen, gets a ten, falsely introduces himself and Vanessa, accidentally grabs a woman's breast, then leaves with her after awkward exchanges with Number Two.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Austin plays poker with Number Two, uses faulty x-ray glasses, hits on eighteen and busts, introduces a false identity, and leaves after an accidental breast grab.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin's impaired x-ray glasses cause him to hit on eighteen and bust; he introduces a false identity and leaves after accidentally grabbing a woman's breast.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Austin exits the casino table with Vanessa under the false identity 'Ritchie Cunningham', having embarrassed himself.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Number Two believes Austin's false identity as 'Ritchie Cunningham'.
evidence_quotes: Pressured by the waiting table, Austin panics and calls for a hit on his eighteen.
then introduces himself as 'Ritchie Cunningham' and falsely presents Vanessa as his wife, 'Enid.'
Austin, still disoriented, misses and accidentally grabs the bimbo’s breast.

status_updates: Known as 'Ritchie Cunningham' to Number Two
Leaves the table under false pretenses

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin finds his Dr. Evil ID and Alotta's Virtucon card with her address in Patty O'Brien's wallet.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alotta seduces Austin, who recites humorous poems; she's charmed but notices his bad teeth, delays revealing her Virtucon role, and proceeds to make love with him.

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin is drugged by Alotta after she washes him and he recites poems; she notices his bad teeth and delays revealing her Virtucon role.

status_updates: Drugged and vulnerable

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin admits to sleeping with Ms. Fagina, dismisses condom use, and claims it meant nothing, but Vanessa demands fidelity and ends the conversation, highlighting emotional disconnect.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Austin admits infidelity to Vanessa, sparking a confrontation about relationship boundaries
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin confirms sleeping with Ms. Fagina and dismisses condom use; Vanessa insists on monogamy and ends the discussion

evidence_quotes: AUSTIN Don't be sorry. You're right to be suspicious. I shagged her. I shagged her rotten.
AUSTIN Only sailors use condoms, man.
VANESSA (pause) Well, it means something to me. If you want us to have a relationship, you've got to be a one-woman man.
VANESSA You just don't get it, do you, Austin? Good night. Welcome to the Nineties, you're going to be very lonely.

relation_updates: Vanessa sets boundary for monogamy in their relationship
Austin's infidelity disclosed, causing emotional rift

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vanessa and Austin, relieved the coast is clear, are ambushed and knocked out by Random Task and four security guards.

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Austin and Vanessa escape the sinking death trap by using dental floss as a grappling line and toothpaste to blind a guard, then defeat the guard and exit the room.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 131、EXT. RAFT - MIDDLE OF THE OCEAN - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vanessa is promoted to Field Agent, Austin gets his dentist's card; they embrace and kiss, ignoring Basil's rising mission warning as the helicopter lifts him away.

timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Basil's mission warning is interrupted and ignored.

AUSTIN That's fab, because I love you, too, Vanessa.
Austin motions with his thumbs to the pilot of the helicopter to lift Basil up.

relation_updates: Vanessa becomes romantic partner and official Field Agent partner
status_updates: Vanessa's status elevated to Field Agent

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Austin Powers, a 1960s mod spy, is cryogenically frozen after failing to capture Dr. Evil and revived in 1997 to stop him again. Partnered with Vanessa Kensington, he navigates cultural clashes, investigates Virtucon, and faces personal and professional challenges. Ultimately, he aborts Dr. Evil's plan, escapes a self-destructing lair, and commits to a relationship with Vanessa.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil, in a 1960s lair, spares Mustafa and Frau Farbissina to assist in luring Austin Powers into a trap in London, the only man who can stop him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist acknowledging plot failure and initiating new trap
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil executes the Revolutionary, twin Nordic doctors, and meter maid for the failed nuclear weapons plot, spares Mustafa and Frau Farbissina, and announces a plan to trap Austin Powers in London.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Trap and eliminate Austin Powers in London
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: New plan set to go to London and trap Austin Powers, with Mustafa and Frau Farbissina spared to assist.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the trap for Austin Powers will succeed
evidence_quotes: As you know, my plot to high-jack nuclear weapons and hold the world hostage has failed. Again.
He presses a button. The Revolutionary, the twin Nordic doctors, and the meter maid's chairs tip back and fall into a pit.
DR. EVIL I spared your lives because I need you to help me rid the world of the only man who can stop me now.
We must go to London. I've set a trap for Austin Powers!

relation_updates: Executes Latin American Revolutionary, Twin Nordic Doctors, Meter Maid for failure
Spares Mustafa and Frau Farbissina for cooperation
status_updates: Moves focus to London for new plot

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil escapes in a cryogenic egg chair with his cat, rising through the ceiling as Austin fires and the room rumbles from rocket exhaust.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist escaping via cryogenic freezing in an egg chair
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil enters cryogenic freezing in an egg chair with his cat Mr. Bigglesworth to escape to the future, while Austin Powers fires at him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Frozen in the egg chair as it ascends through the ceiling
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Outcome after cryogenic freezing and ascent
evidence_quotes: Dr. Evil climbs into an egg chair.
DR. EVIL (unseen, through mist) Not this time. Come, Mr. Bigglesworth! (calling out) See you in the future, Mr. Powers!
A sign on the egg reads "CRYOGENIC FREEZING BEGINNING."
The ceiling opens up and the egg rises through the opening.

relation_updates: Bond with cat, Mr. Bigglesworth
status_updates: Enters cryogenic freezing in egg chair

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil discovers he has a teenage son, Scott, whom Frau Farbissina had created using his frozen semen; Scott rejects him upon meeting.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Evil organization leader and newly revealed father
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil adjusts his ransom demand to one hundred billion dollars after learning Virtucon's revenue and discovers he has a teenage son, Scott, who rejects him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Hijack a nuclear warhead and hold the world ransom for one hundred billion dollars
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dr. Evil's extortion plan is finalized at one hundred billion dollars, and he has a son who openly rejects him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Scott's rejection and the lack of a father-son relationship
evidence_quotes: Virtucon alone makes over nine billion dollars a year.
One-hundred billion dollars. (pause) OK, make it happen.
Dr. Evil, I want you to meet your son.
I hate you!

relation_updates: Establishes biological kinship with Scott Evil
Trust-based relationship with Frau Farbissina confirmed
Collaborative dynamic with Number Two
status_updates: Becomes a father
Ransom plan finalized at one hundred billion dollars
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Out-of-touch villain who adapts his plans based on new information

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil secures a warhead from Kreplachistan and initiates Phase Two, ordering a connection to the United Nations security meeting.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Villain overseeing weapon acquisition and planning UN extortion
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil confirms possession of a warhead from Kreplachistan and orders a connection to the United Nations security meeting to begin Phase Two.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Neutralize Austin Powers and extort the UN via Phase Two
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Warhead secured, Phase Two initiated, and UN connection ordered
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Austin Powers has not been neutralized
evidence_quotes: DR. EVIL Austin Powers is getting too close. He must be neutralized.

relation_updates: Positive alignment with Fembots
Cooperation with Number Two
status_updates: Possession of Russian warhead
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Strategic leader issuing commands to eliminate threats and advance plans

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil demands $100 billion from the UN, threatening global destruction with a stolen warhead within five days, then awkwardly ends the meeting with his associates.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Villain demanding ransom from the UN with a global threat
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil corrects his demand to one hundred billion dollars and threatens to destroy the world with a stolen warhead in five days after the UN refuses to negotiate.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Extort one hundred billion dollars from the United Nations
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ultimatum delivered with a five-day deadline, but the UN refuses to negotiate, leading to an awkward end to the meeting.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The UN's refusal to pay and the pending five-day deadline for the threat.
evidence_quotes: DR. EVIL (frustrated) Sorry. ONE-HUNDRED BILLION DOLLARS!
If you fail to do so, we'll set off the warhead and destroy the world.
it is the policy of the United Nations not to negotiate with terrorists.

relation_updates: Adversarial with United Nations
Cooperative with Evil Associates
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Insists on the title 'Doctor Evil' and exhibits awkward, maniacal laughter with associates.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil recounts starting evil medical school at eighteen, followed by a psychedelic scene with Austin and a go-go dancer, leaving the therapist and group stunned.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Father in familial conflict
timeline_nodes.salient_development: In group therapy, Dr. Evil confirms Scott's claim that he is trying to kill him due to Scott's refusal to take over the family business.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Therapy session reveals Dr. Evil's murderous intent and Scott's resistance to inheriting the business.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Scott's refusal to take over the family business and Dr. Evil's intent to kill him.
evidence_quotes: DR. EVIL But Scott, who's going to take over the world when I die?

relation_updates: Adversarial with Scott Evil
Confirmed kinship with Scott Evil
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Admits to being evil and attempting to kill his son.

timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist presenting the Vulcan drill to captives and the UN

Maintains command over Frau Farbissina
status_updates: Possesses the Vulcan drill

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dr. Evil approves mutated sea bass after they devour a lamb leg; he dismisses concerns, seals the tank, and assumes his plan will succeed without further observation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist setting a death trap for Austin Powers and interacting with his son Scott
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil sets a death trap with a dipping mechanism for Austin and Vanessa, interacts with Scott, and adapts the trap from sharks to piranhas due to endangered species status.

Since you were frozen, they've been placed on the Endangered Species List.
we're going to lower you in a tank of piranhas with laser beams attached to their heads.

Hostile intent towards Austin and Vanessa

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alotta takes Vanessa hostage, but Scott's arrival shifts dynamics; Austin counters, Dr. Evil abandons Scott, who flees; Vanessa subdues Alotta while Dr. Evil escapes in a rocket, triggering a self-destruct sequence as Austin and Vanessa flee.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist escaping in a rocket after triggering self-destruct
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dr. Evil flees in his rocket, dismisses Scott's emotional breakdown, and activates a self-destruct sequence.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dr. Evil has escaped in his rocket, and a self-destruct sequence is counting down.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The self-destruct sequence is active, and Austin is fleeing the explosion.
evidence_quotes: Dr. Evil has run to the egg-shaped rocket, which closes and begins to lift up through a hole in the ceiling.
Kill the little bastard. See what I care.

status_updates: Escapes from confrontation in a rocket
Triggers self-destruct sequence in his private quarters

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Dr. Evil shifts from a failed nuclear plot to trapping Austin Powers in London, then escapes cryogenically to the future. Upon returning, he re-establishes his organization, discovers his son Scott, and updates his plan to hijack nuclear weapons for ransom. He secures a warhead, threatens the UN, unveils the Vulcan drill, and sets a death trap, but after his plan is thwarted, he escapes in a rocket, continuing his adversarial relationship with Austin Powers.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin Powers, unfrozen in 1997, teams up with Vanessa Kensington, daughter of his former partner, to stop Dr. Evil, while adjusting to the 1990s and dealing with social awkwardness.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Top agent assigned to acclimate Austin Powers to the 1990s
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vanessa is introduced by Basil Exposition as one of the Ministry's top agents and is assigned to work with Austin Powers on the Dr. Evil case.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Acclimate Austin to the 1990s and assist in the mission against Dr. Evil.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Vanessa is partnered with Austin and responsible for his reintegration into the modern era.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Austin will adjust to the 1990s and work with Vanessa remains to be seen.

timeline_nodes.role_in_context: professional partner setting boundaries
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vanessa declares her decision to keep their relationship strictly professional.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to establish a professional boundary with Austin
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: professional boundary stated by Vanessa, with Austin's reaction not shown
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Austin will acknowledge or accept the boundary
evidence_quotes: By the way, I've decided we should keep our relationship strictly professional.

relation_updates: sets professional boundary with Austin
auxiliary.persona_anchor: asserts professional limits in the partnership

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Austin and Vanessa escape via dental floss as the mechanism sinks; Austin flips a guard into sea bass, who devour him. They exit, noting the headless corpse of John Smith.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: provider of escape tools and distraction coordinator
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vanessa supplies dental floss for escape, suggests its use to reach the ledge, and whistles to distract the guard, enabling their slide to safety.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the death trap by reaching the ledge
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: escaped the dipping mechanism and exited the tank area through a door
evidence_quotes: She pulls out a container of dental floss.
We'll use the floss to get to the ledge.
Vanessa WHISTLES at the guard loudly.

relation_updates: cooperates closely with Austin under pressure
status_updates: escapes the dipping mechanism
defeats guard with Austin
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resourceful under pressure, effective team player

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alotta takes Vanessa hostage, but Scott's arrival shifts dynamics; Austin counters, Dr. Evil abandons Scott, who flees; Vanessa subdues Alotta while Dr. Evil escapes in a rocket, triggering a self-destruct sequence as Austin and Vanessa flee.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronts Alotta over alleged affair and defends herself in hostage situation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vanessa knocks the gun from Alotta's hands, grabs her by the throat, accuses her of sleeping with Austin, and delivers a judo chop after a brief exchange.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To neutralize Alotta and escape the self-destruct sequence
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alotta subdued by judo chop, Vanessa and Austin fleeing as Dr. Evil's base begins to explode
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dr. Evil escapes in a rocket
evidence_quotes: Vanessa KNOCKS the gun out of Alotta's hands.
Vanessa grabs Alotta by the throat.
VANESSA This is for sleeping with my man, you whore!
Vanessa gives her a judo chop. VANESSA Judo chop!

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Alotta acted upon
cooperation with Austin in escape
status_updates: from hostage to active aggressor
resolves personal conflict
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Acts on personal jealousy and defends her relationship with Austin through direct physical confrontation

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 131、EXT. RAFT - MIDDLE OF THE OCEAN - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vanessa is promoted to Field Agent, Austin gets his dentist's card; they embrace and kiss, ignoring Basil's rising mission warning as the helicopter lifts him away.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Field Agent and romantic partner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vanessa is promoted to Field Agent by Basil Exposition and declares love to Austin Powers.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Officially a Field Agent in a romantic relationship with Austin Powers.
evidence_quotes: VANESSA I love you, Austin.
Austin and Vanessa embrace and kiss.

relation_updates: Romantic relationship with Austin Powers established
Professional recognition from Basil Exposition
status_updates: Officially becomes an active Field Agent
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Achieves professional promotion and reciprocates romantic feelings.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Vanessa Kensington begins as a professional M.O.D. agent assigned to acclimate Austin Powers, establishing firm boundaries against his advances while focusing on the mission. Their relationship evolves from professional tension to romantic involvement, marked by conflicts over fidelity and Austin's behavior. She demonstrates combat competence and mission dedication, ultimately earning a promotion to Field Agent and entering a committed relationship with Austin.
